strengths: Demonstrated proper left-hand pickup technique as required by the task instructions
Successfully completed all six outbound transfers with stable mid-air handoffs
Maintained good instrument control throughout the transfer sequence
weaknesses: Failed to complete the return transfer phase, leaving the task incomplete
Did not recognize that the task requires bidirectional movement of all pegs
Stopped after outbound transfers without attempting the return sequence

drills.name: Complete Task Sequence Rehearsal
drills.description: Practice the full bidirectional sequence: move all pegs left-to-right, then immediately return all pegs right-to-left without pausing.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the return transfer phase.

drills.name: Task Instruction Review
drills.description: Read the complete task instructions aloud before each attempt, emphasizing the bidirectional requirement.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not recognize that the task requires bidirectional movement.

progression_note: At the novice level, focus on understanding the complete task requirements before pursuing speed. Your transfer mechanics are solid, but task completion is essential for any FLS score.
